'''bayulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mlem|mlem]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mlem|mlem]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bayulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæyilith|bæyilith]] || [[word:bæyilij|bæyilij]] || [[word:bæyilish|bæyilish]] || [[word:bæyili|bæyili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bayuyuluth|bayuyuluth]] || [[word:bayuyuluj|bayuyuluj]] || [[word:bayuyulush|bayuyulush]] || [[word:bayuyulu|bayuyulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bayuluth|bayuluth]] || [[word:bayuluj|bayuluj]] || [[word:bayulush|bayulush]] || [[word:bayulu|bayulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bayufluth|bayufluth]] || [[word:bayufluj|bayufluj]] || [[word:bayuflush|bayuflush]] || [[word:bayufluf|bayufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bayuluthu|bayuluthu]] || [[word:bayuluju|bayuluju]] || [[word:bayulushu|bayulushu]] || [[word:bayuluku|bayuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bayuluth|bayuluth]] || [[word:bayuluj|bayuluj]] || [[word:bayulush|bayulush]] || [[word:bayulu|bayulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bayuluthul|bayuluthul]] || [[word:bayulujul|bayulujul]] || [[word:bayulushul|bayulushul]] || [[word:bayulukul|bayulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bayuluthuthu|bayuluthuthu]] || [[word:bayulujuju|bayulujuju]] || [[word:bayulushushu|bayulushushu]] || [[word:bayuluku|bayuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bayuluthun|bayuluthun]] || [[word:bayulujun|bayulujun]] || [[word:bayulushun|bayulushun]] || [[word:bayulukun|bayulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bayuluthuoro|bayuluthuoro]] || [[word:bayulujuoro|bayulujuoro]] || [[word:bayulushuoro|bayulushuoro]] || [[word:bayulukuoro|bayulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
